items.title: CMA secures fairer deal for publishers and improves Google search services in UK
items.abstract: Conduct requirement introduced today gives publishers more control and stronger bargaining power over the use of their content.

items.title: Commission approves Carlyle's acquisition of BASF Coatings, subject to conditions
items.abstract: The European Commission has approved, under the EU Merger Regulation, the proposed acquisition of BASF's coatings division ('BASF Coatings') by The Carlyle Group Inc. ('Carlyle').

items.title: Commission opens in-depth foreign subsidies investigation into JD.com's proposed acquisition of CECONOMY
items.abstract: The European Commission has opened an in-depth investigation to assess, under the Foreign Subsidies Regulation ('FSR'), the proposed acquisition by JD.com, Inc. ('JD.com') of CECONOMY AG ('CECONOMY').

items.title: Commission unconditionally approves Arla's acquisition of DMK and DOC
items.abstract: The European Commission has unconditionally approved, under the EU Merger Regulation, the proposed acquisition by Arla Foods amba ('Arla') of Deutsches Milchkontor eG ('DMK') and Drents Overijsselse Coöperatie Kaas U.A.('DOC').

items.title: Commission sends Statements of Objections to several companies concerning synthetic turf cartels
items.abstract: The European Commission has informed several companies active in the synthetic turf sector of its preliminary view that they have breached EU antitrust rules by colluding to distort competition in synthetic turf for sports pitches in the Netherlands and Germany.

items.title: Održana konferencija o tržišnom natjecanju „Meet to Compete-Repeat Competition Law and Policy Conference“
items.abstract: Konferencija „Meet to Compete Competition Law and Policy Conference – Tools for the New Rules“ održana je 14. i 15. svibnja 2026. u Opatiji, u organizaciji Međunarodne trgovačke komore – ICC Croatia i Hrvatske gospodarske komore, uz podršku Agencije za zaštitu tržišnog natjecanja (AZTN). Konferencija je i ove godine okupila vodeće europske i međunarodne stručnjake […] Objava Održana konferencija o tržišnom natjecanju „Meet to Compete-Repeat Competition Law and Policy Conference“ pojavila se prvi puta na AZTN .

items.title: CMA conditionally clears Getty merger with Shutterstock
items.abstract: CMA independent inquiry group concludes deal can proceed if Shutterstock sells its editorial business

items.title: CMA launches strategic market status investigation into Microsoft’s business software ecosystem
items.abstract: CMA sets out scope of its investigation to determine whether Microsoft should be designated with strategic market status for its business software ecosystem.

synthesis.headline: Digital Competition Digest — 2026-W23
synthesis.executive_summary: AI analysis is disabled (--no-ai mode). This digest aggregates 10 items from ECN, arXiv, EUR-Lex, and CJEU published in the last 30 days. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and remove --no-ai to enable summaries and thematic analysis.
